# Refactor Plan Generated by FR-META-REFAC-001

## Objectives
- Consolidate schema modules (audit, perf) into single src/lib/schema.ts
- Wrap CLI commands for audit and expand
- Split slow integration tests
- Preserve lib purity by moving IO imports

## Success Criteria
✓ All clusters ranked and de-duplicated
✓ 5 execution phases identified
✓ vitest < 15s
✓ Zero regression tests fail

## Terminal Intent Gates
- intent-init: problem clarity (refactoring goals clear)
- intent-term: solution verified (all changes integrate)
- mine-run: evidence collected (agent findings recorded)
- audit-surface: surface audited (layout verified)
- perf-budget: performance targets met (vitest <15s)
